title: More Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: More Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with More Retail! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
